summary: Frontend testing completed for all 9 new changes in Fruitee platform. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: SignInPage sign-up tab: Phone label renamed to 'Mobile' - PASS
BusinessProfilePage: Social media section shows 4 connect buttons (Instagram, TikTok Shop, TikTok, YouTube) - PASS
BusinessProfilePage: No text input fields for social handles (replaced with buttons) - PASS
InfluencerProfilePage: Social media section shows 4 connect buttons (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, TikTok Shop) - PASS
InfluencerProfilePage: No text input fields for social handles (replaced with buttons) - PASS
InfluencerPreferencesPage: Region section subtitle says 'Which regions do your followers lie in?' - PASS
InfluencerPreferencesPage: Region section uses square checkboxes for multi-select - PASS
BrandSetupPage: Has 'Connect Social Media Accounts' section - PASS
BrandSetupPage: Has 4 connect buttons (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, TikTok Shop) - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Selecting 'product-launch' shows Products sub-form with Product Name, Description, Price fields - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Product-launch has Add Product button - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Can add multiple products - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Selecting 'event-promo' shows Events sub-form with Name, Venue, Dates, Tickets fields - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Event-promo has Add Event button - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Can add multiple events - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Selecting 'promotion' shows Promotions sub-form with Promo Name, Description, Code fields - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Promotion has Add Promotion button - PASS
CampaignTypePage: Can add multiple promotions - PASS
seed_data_creation: None - all data is MOCKED in localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 requested changes verified working correctly. Business flow: set localStorage userRole='business' to test BusinessProfilePage, BrandSetupPage, CampaignTypePage. Influencer flow: set localStorage userRole='influencer' and fruitee_influencer_progress={profile:true} to access InfluencerPreferencesPage. All data is mocked via localStorage.
mocked_api_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - No backend integration. Form data stored in localStorage only.
